'''Barons Knoll''' was a hill on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. It gave its name to the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Barons Hed]] that was built around it. 

The summit of Barons Knoll was the location of [[Government House (Sulon)|Government House]], built after the [[Subjugation of Sulon]] ([[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]). The residences built near it formed the [[High Town]], belonged to the wealthiest citizens; the buildings falling away gradually near the bottom formed the [[Low Town]] and belonged to the poorest strata.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

{{Nature-stub}}
==Behind the scenes==
Barons Knoll appears in ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'', the novelization of the earlier video game ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II|Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]''. In that game, an overview of the city is seen in a cutscene, and although the high Palace is at its center, no gradual elevation is seen, as described in the novella.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''
